County hub · Updated June 2026

St. Lucie County Restaurant Health Grades

82%Grade A
4.2Avg rating
76Restaurants
2Cities

Diner ratings and health grades don't always agree in St. Lucie County — and DAVINCI'S RESTAURANT is the proof, 4.5 stars from 1,266 reviews on top of an F inspection grade. This page grades all 76 restaurants here on the kitchen, not the crowd; 82% earn an A.

Cities in St. Lucie County

  • Port St Lucie 41
  • Fort Pierce 26

St. Lucie County restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are St. Lucie County restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 76 St. Lucie County restaurants we grade, 62 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to St. Lucie County restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in St. Lucie County?

We currently publish 76 graded restaurants in St. Lucie County, with an average diner rating of 4.2 stars; 62 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.
